info.name: MediTrack API
info.description: API tests for MediTrack medical appointment scheduler. Covers auth, doctors, slots, appointments and notifications.

exec: pm.test("Response time is under 2 seconds", function () {
pm.test("Status code is 201 (first run) or 400 (subsequent runs)", function () {
pm.test("On duplicate, message indicates user exists", function () {
pm.test("Response contains role and email", function () {
